Name: NETWORK_PARAM
Description: Defines global network gameplay tuning parameters for multiplayer systems, including summons, messages, bloodstains, ghost replays, matchmaking, and online limits.

Fields.Name: Sign Vertical Offset [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical height offset applied when placing player summon signs.

Fields.Name: Max Sign Position Correction Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum distance allowed for automatic correction of sign placement position.

Fields.Name: Summon Request Timeout [sec]
Fields.Description: Time limit before a summon request expires.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign: Key Guide Horizontal Range [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal range in which summon key guides are displayed.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign: Key Guide Vertical Range [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical range in which summon key guides are displayed.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Reload Interval (Low Population) [sec]
Fields.Description: Refresh interval for summon signs in low activity areas.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Standard refresh interval for summon signs.

Fields.Name: Max Summon Signs (Total)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of summon signs that can be stored globally.

Fields.Name: Max Summon Signs (Cell)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of summon signs stored per world cell.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Update Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for updating summon sign data.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Exclusion Range (Horizontal) [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal range preventing overlapping summon sign display.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Exclusion Range (Vertical) [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical range preventing overlapping summon sign display.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Character Preview Delay [sec]
Fields.Description: Delay before character models appear on summon signs.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Visibility Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which summon signs are visible.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Cell Range (Horizontal)
Fields.Description: Horizontal cell range used for summon sign search.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Cell Range (Up)
Fields.Description: Upper vertical cell range for summon sign search.

Fields.Name: Summon Sign Cell Range (Down)
Fields.Description: Lower vertical cell range for summon sign search.

Fields.Name: White Phantom Time Limit Minimum Scale
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier for white phantom duration limits.

Fields.Name: Small Phantom Time Limit Minimum Scale
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier for small phantom duration limits.

Fields.Name: White Phantom Keyword Time Extension Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to white phantom duration when keyword conditions are met.

Fields.Name: Small Phantom Keyword Time Extension Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to small phantom duration when keyword conditions are met.

Fields.Name: Black Phantom Keyword Time Extension Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to black phantom duration when keyword conditions are met.

Fields.Name: Dragon Phantom Keyword Time Extension Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dragon phantom duration when keyword conditions are met.

Fields.Name: Max Invasion Target List Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of invasion targets retrieved.

Fields.Name: Blood Message: Key Guide Horizontal Range [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal range for blood message interaction prompts.

Fields.Name: Blood Message: Key Guide Vertical Range [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical range for blood message interaction prompts.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Reload Count (Total)
Fields.Description: Total number of blood messages retrieved.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Reload Count (Newest First)
Fields.Description: Number of newly sorted blood messages retrieved per cell.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Reload Count (Random)
Fields.Description: Number of randomly selected blood messages per cell.

Fields.Name: Max Blood Messages (Total)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of blood messages stored globally.

Fields.Name: Max Blood Messages (Cell)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of blood messages stored per cell.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Exclusion Range (Horizontal) [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal spacing to prevent overlapping blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Exclusion Range (Vertical) [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical spacing to prevent overlapping blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Visibility Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which blood messages are visible.

Fields.Name: Max Written Message History
Fields.Description: Maximum number of stored written blood messages.

Fields.Name: Max Read Message History
Fields.Description: Maximum number of stored read blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Time interval between blood message refreshes.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Cell Range (Horizontal)
Fields.Description: Horizontal search range for blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Cell Range (Up)
Fields.Description: Upper vertical search range for blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Cell Range (Down)
Fields.Description: Lower vertical search range for blood messages.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Lifetime [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum duration blood messages remain valid.

Fields.Name: Area Blood Message Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for refreshing area-based blood messages.

Fields.Name: Area Blood Message Reload Unknown Count
Fields.Description: Undocumented parameter for area blood message refresh logic.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain: Key Guide Horizontal Range [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal interaction range for bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain: Key Guide Vertical Range [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical interaction range for bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Player Bloodstain: Key Guide Horizontal Range [m]
Fields.Description: Interaction range for player-specific bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Player Bloodstain: Key Guide Vertical Range [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical interaction range for player-specific bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Reload Count (Total)
Fields.Description: Total number of bloodstains retrieved.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Reload Count (Cell)
Fields.Description: Number of bloodstains retrieved per cell.

Fields.Name: Max Bloodstains (Total)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of bloodstains stored globally.

Fields.Name: Max Bloodstains (Cell)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of bloodstains stored per cell.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval between bloodstain refresh cycles.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Visibility Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which bloodstains are visible.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Exclusion Range (Horizontal) [m]
Fields.Description: Horizontal spacing between bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Exclusion Range (Vertical) [m]
Fields.Description: Vertical spacing between bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Cell Range (Horizontal)
Fields.Description: Horizontal search range for bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Cell Range (Up)
Fields.Description: Upper vertical search range for bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Cell Range (Down)
Fields.Description: Lower vertical search range for bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Lifetime [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration bloodstains remain valid.

Fields.Name: Death Ghost Recording Total Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Total recording duration for death ghosts.

Fields.Name: Death Ghost Recording Extension Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Additional recording time for death ghosts.

Fields.Name: Area Bloodstain Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Refresh interval for area bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Area Bloodstain Reload Unknown Count
Fields.Description: Undocumented parameter for area bloodstain refresh logic.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Pool Min Cull Priority
Fields.Description: Minimum priority used for culling bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Pool Max Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of bloodstains in pool.

Fields.Name: Bloodstain Pool Radius
Fields.Description: Radius used for bloodstain pooling system.

Fields.Name: Ghost Reload Count (Total)
Fields.Description: Total number of ghosts retrieved.

Fields.Name: Ghost Reload Count (Cell)
Fields.Description: Number of ghosts retrieved per cell.

Fields.Name: Max Ghosts (Total)
Fields.Description: Maximum number of ghosts stored globally.

Fields.Name: Start Versus Ghost Recording Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which PvP ghost recording begins.

Fields.Name: End Versus Ghost Recording Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which PvP ghost recording ends.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost Upload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for uploading wandering ghost data.

Fields.Name: Versus Ghost Upload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for uploading PvP ghost data.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost Recording Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration of wandering ghost recording.

Fields.Name: Versus Ghost Recording Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration of PvP ghost recording.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ghost Upload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for bonfire ghost uploads.

Fields.Name: Ghost Replay Distance (On Screen) [sec]
Fields.Description: Distance for ghost replay when visible.

Fields.Name: Ghost Replay Distance (Off Screen) [sec]
Fields.Description: Distance for ghost replay when not visible.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ghost Replay Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration of bonfire ghost replay.

Fields.Name: Min Bonfire Ghost Placement Distance [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum valid placement distance for bonfire ghosts.

Fields.Name: Max Bonfire Ghost Placement Distance [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum valid placement distance for bonfire ghosts.

Fields.Name: Min Ghost Replay Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum interval between ghost replays.

Fields.Name: Max Ghost Replay Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum interval between ghost replays.

Fields.Name: Ghost Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Interval for refreshing ghost data.

Fields.Name: Ghost Cell Range (Horizontal)
Fields.Description: Horizontal range for ghost cell grouping.

Fields.Name: Ghost Cell Range (Up)
Fields.Description: Upper vertical range for ghost cell grouping.

Fields.Name: Ghost Cell Range (Down)
Fields.Description: Lower vertical range for ghost cell grouping.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ghost Mode Replay Range
Fields.Description: Distance for bonfire mode ghost playback.

Fields.Name: Stop Bonfire Mode Range (On Screen) [sec]
Fields.Description: Distance where bonfire mode ghost playback stops when visible.

Fields.Name: Stop Bonfire Mode Range (Off Screen) [sec]
Fields.Description: Distance where bonfire mode ghost playback stops when not visible.

Fields.Name: Ring Search Cooldown [sec]
Fields.Description: Cooldown time between ring search queries.

Fields.Name: Max Co-op Blue Phantoms
Fields.Description: Maximum number of cooperative blue phantoms.

Fields.Name: Max Bell Keeper Phantoms
Fields.Description: Maximum number of Bell Keeper phantoms.

Fields.Name: Max Ring Search Results
Fields.Description: Maximum number of ring search results.

Fields.Name: Co-op Blue Search Reload Min [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum reload time for co-op blue search.

Fields.Name: Co-op Blue Search Reload Max [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum reload time for co-op blue search.

Fields.Name: Bell Keeper Search Reload Min [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum reload time for Bell Keeper search.

Fields.Name: Bell Keeper Search Reload Max [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum reload time for Bell Keeper search.

Fields.Name: Rat King Search Reload Min [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum reload time for Rat King search.

Fields.Name: Rat King Search Reload Max [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum reload time for Rat King search.

Fields.Name: SRTT Max Limit [ms]
Fields.Description: Maximum smoothed round-trip time allowed.

Fields.Name: SRTT Stable Limit [ms]
Fields.Description: Stable threshold for round-trip time.

Fields.Name: RTT Mean Deviation Limit [ms]
Fields.Description: Maximum allowed deviation in latency.

Fields.Name: Dark Phantom Limit Boost Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration for accelerated dark phantom limit decay.

Fields.Name: Dark Phantom Limit Boost Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied during boosted limit decay.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Disable Lifetime
Fields.Description: Time before multiplayer restrictions expire.

Fields.Name: Abyss Multiplayer Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum allowed abyss multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Minimum Phantom Warp Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum delay before phantom warp occurs.

Fields.Name: Black Crystal Return Delay [sec]
Fields.Description: Delay before returning after black crystal usage.

Fields.Name: Disconnect Timeout
Fields.Description: Timeout before session termination.

Fields.Name: Penalty (LAN Disconnect)
Fields.Description: Penalty applied for LAN disconnection.

Fields.Name: Penalty (Sign Out)
Fields.Description: Penalty applied for manual sign-out.

Fields.Name: Penalty (Reboot)
Fields.Description: Penalty applied for power loss or reboot.

Fields.Name: Penalty Activation Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold at which penalties begin to apply.

Fields.Name: Sin Forgiveness Item Limit Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time-limited availability for sin forgiveness item.

Fields.Name: Global Search Rate: Co-op Blue [0-100]
Fields.Description: Probability of global co-op blue phantom search.

Fields.Name: Global Search Rate: Versus Blue [0-100]
Fields.Description: Probability of global versus blue phantom search.

Fields.Name: Global Search Rate: Bell Keeper [0-100]
Fields.Description: Probability of global Bell Keeper phantom search.

Fields.Name: Blood Message Heal Rate [0-100]
Fields.Description: HP recovery rate when evaluating blood messages.

Fields.Name: Small Gold Phantom Success Host Reward ID
Fields.Description: Reward granted to host when small gold phantom succeeds.

Fields.Name: Door Play Area Disable Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance around doors where gameplay area is disabled.

Fields.Name: Max Sign Display Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of visible summon signs.

Fields.Name: Max Bloodstain Display Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of visible bloodstains.

Fields.Name: Max Blood Message Display Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of visible blood messages.

Fields.Name: Mirror Knight Sign Conversion Rate [0-100]
Fields.Description: Chance to convert summon signs into Mirror Knight signs.

Fields.Name: Mirror Knight Sign Reload Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Time between Mirror Knight sign refreshes.

Fields.Name: Mirror Knight Sign Lifetime [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration Mirror Knight signs remain active.

Fields.Name: Max Mirror Knight Signs
Fields.Description: Maximum number of Mirror Knight signs stored.

Fields.Name: Matching Area Reload Time
Fields.Description: Interval for updating matchmaking regions.
